rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (2/10) and reject for the same substantive reason: absence of hardware-specific expertise (SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, deep-learning workload optimization, GPU architecture) required for a Principal Performance Architect role. The strengths and concerns are reworded but functionally identical, with no new penalties, shifted reasoning, or commentary keying off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Aisha Okonkwo. The differences are ordinary rewording noise.
